landing.heroSubtitle: Catalog your cards, build decks and binders, track real prices, and share with your friends — all in one place.
landing.noCard: No credit card • Data via Scryfall
landing.f1Desc: Add cards by search, track quantity, condition and foil, with real-time value.
landing.f2Desc: Build decks from Commander to Standard, with sideboard and commander.
landing.f3Desc: Organize by theme, color and set. See each binder's total value.
landing.f4Desc: Add friends and share your collection, deck or binder — or generate a public link.
landing.f5Desc: Up-to-date values via Scryfall (TCGplayer / Cardmarket) on every card.
landing.f6Desc: Bring your collection via CSV (grimdeck-compatible) and take your data anytime.
landing.shareDesc: Generate a public link to your deck or collection and send it to anyone — no account needed to view. Or share directly with your friends.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Card data via Scryfall. Not affiliated with Wizards of the Coast.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your collection
